---
title: "UKHSA Data Analysis"
author: "Katy Brown"
format: html
---
```{r}
library(tidyverse)
library(gt)
```

I have downloaded the data for lead exposure data per year.

```{r}
lead <- read_csv("data/ukhsa-chart-download.csv")

gt(head(lead))
```

Now I will plot the number of cases per year over time.

```{r}
ggplot(lead,
       aes(x = date, y=metric_value)) +
  geom_line(color='blue')  +
  xlab("Date") +
  ylab("Number of cases") +
  ggtitle("Lead Exposure Cases per Year")
```
